rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE FIORANI LIVING TRUST DTD. 1/25/02 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order: 1)Settling And Approving Receiver'S Final Accounting And Report; 2)Discharging Receiver; And 3) Exonerating Receiver'S Bond
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 9, 2021 line 1. RECEIVER'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ORDER 1) SETTLING AND APPROVING RECEIVER'S FINAL ACCOUNTING AND REPORT; 2) DISCHARGING RECEIVER; AND 3) EXONERATING RECEIVER'S BOND is GRANTED. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR APPOINTMENT OF CONSERVATOR OF ESTATE
rulings.Rulings: Appearances: Amy Harrington appeared by zoom for and with Gayle Rosenthal (petioner) by zoom and for and with Robert Meyerson (petitioner) by zoom. Christopher Jew court appointed counsel appeared by zoom for and with Jeffrey Meyerson (proposed conservatee) by zoom. Andrew Schultz appeared by zoom for and with David Keeler (proposed conservator) by zoom. Leanne Pettichord (sister) appeared by zoom in propria persona. Joel Meyerson (brother) appeared by zoom in propria persona. Michael Rosenthal (brother) appeared by zoom in propria persona. Judge: Joseph Quinn. Court Investigator: Naomi Brandes.
